The '''''Hornet''-class interceptor''' was a sleek, insect-like [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built on the black market for the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Hornet-Interceptor_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Hornet schematics]]

It was designed to emulate the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]: fast, lightweight, and easily mass-produced with low-cost standard parts.

Hornets had thin, rounded bodies with wings that could be deployed in atmospheres. The command pod had its own section, and could be ejected in emergencies. They were lightly armored, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]], and highly maneuverable.

Their [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] could be turbocharged, causing twice the normal damage but became prone to overheating as a result. Even when not turbocharged, the lasers were more powerful than standard.

==History==
The Hornet was initially used only by the Tenloss Syndicate and those groups it allowed access to the [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]], although shady deals with other criminals and organizations had made the Hornet available elsewhere.
